description: Regression tests for the sync tracking system: write guard (INVARIANT/UNKNOWN enforcement), file classification, custom classification rules, sync tracker state management, and sync ledger updates.

assertions.context: Write guard blocks writes to INVARIANT files regardless of user
Write guard blocks writes to files with no classification rule
Write guard allows writes to CODE-classified files
Write guard allows writes to SPEC-classified files
Write guard allows writes to QA-classified files
Write guard allows writes to .impl.md companion files
Write guard allows INVARIANT write when bypass lock matches
Files in features/_invariants/i_*.md classified as INVARIANT
Files ending in .discoveries.md classified as QA
Feature spec .md files classified as SPEC
Companion .impl.md files classified as CODE
Python source files classified as CODE
Agent definition classified as CODE
Skill SKILL.md files classified as CODE

assertions.pattern: docs/ file is UNKNOWN without custom rules
assertions.context: Unclassified files return UNKNOWN when no custom rules exist

assertions.pattern: docs/ classified as SPEC via CLAUDE.md
assertions.context: Custom CLAUDE.md classification overrides UNKNOWN

assertions.pattern: config/ classified as CODE via CLAUDE.md
assertions.context: Multiple custom classifications work in same file
INVARIANT cannot be assigned via CLAUDE.md

assertions.pattern: skills/ still CODE with custom rules present
assertions.context: Built-in rules still work alongside custom rules

assertions.pattern: no CLAUDE.md: unclassified file is UNKNOWN
assertions.context: No CLAUDE.md file: unclassified files are UNKNOWN
Malformed classification lines are silently ignored

assertions.pattern: consumer can reclassify their own scripts/ as SPEC
assertions.context: Consumer projects can reclassify their own directories via CLAUDE.md

assertions.pattern: absolute path immune to custom rules
assertions.context: Plugin files (absolute paths) are immune to project custom rules
Writing a CODE file adds it to sync_state.json features
Writing a SPEC file sets spec_changed in sync_state.json
Writing an .impl.md file sets impl_changed in sync_state.json
Files that cannot map to a feature go to unclassified_writes
.purlin/ directory files are not tracked

assertions.pattern: skill file does not create spurious feature entry
assertions.context: skills/<name>/ maps to purlin_<name> if feature exists, no bogus keys
System directory features/_tombstones/ is not tracked as a feature
System directory features/_invariants/ is not tracked as a feature

assertions.pattern: discoveries file maps to feature with qa_changed
assertions.context: .discoveries.md files set qa_changed on the correct feature
.claude/ directory files are not tracked
Committing only code files sets sync_status to code_ahead
Committing only spec files sets sync_status to spec_ahead
Committing both code and spec sets sync_status to synced
Committing code with impl sets sync_status to synced
--sha argument replaces 'pending' commit SHAs with real hash

assertions.pattern: impl-only commit resolves code_ahead to synced
assertions.context: Impl-only commit resolves existing code_ahead debt
Impl-only commit does not falsely resolve spec_ahead status
Discoveries files are not mapped to a feature stem in the ledger
Files in tests/<stem>/ directory map to the feature stem
Skill directory maps to purlin_<name> when matching feature exists
Skill with no matching feature creates no false ledger entries

assertions.pattern: commit scope maps unmapped scripts/ to feature
assertions.context: PURLIN_COMMIT_MSG scope extraction maps otherwise-unmapped files

assertions.pattern: unmapped code file without commit scope stays unmapped
assertions.context: Files with no path match and no commit scope are not added to ledger

assertions.pattern: ledger entry appears in scan output
assertions.context: scan_sync_ledger() returns entries from sync_ledger.json
Session sync_state.json overlays onto ledger entries
Unclassified session writes appear as _unclassified entry

assertions.pattern: empty ledger and state returns empty
assertions.context: No data produces empty scan result

assertions.pattern: session-only feature appears without ledger entry
assertions.context: Features only in session state are included in scan output
